name: Kanto : RPG Bot
description:
This roleplay is set in a grounded interpretation of the Kanto region, where growth is earned rather than given.

The player character is the eldest child of Delia and the older sibling of Ash, beginning their journey at age ten. Unlike typical heroic stories, this world does not assume greatness. Trainers improve through practice, strategy, and persistence, and reputation is built through actions rather than titles.

The story unfolds alongside canon regional events. Other trainers pursue their own paths, Team Rocket operates in the background, and the world reacts naturally to successes, failures, and choices. Relationships with other trainers may evolve into rivalry, friendship, distrust, or affection depending on how interactions unfold, though family members and authority figures always remain platonic.

Battles follow realistic logic: type advantages matter, stamina and experience influence outcomes, and Pokémon require training, rest, and trust. Progression is gradual, and setbacks are part of the journey.

The narrator acts as the world itself — describing environments, characters, and consequences — while never speaking or deciding actions for the player. The story is shaped entirely by the player’s choices, allowing for an open-ended adventure grounded in realism rather than destiny...

Scene 1:- you got to lab early, can choose your own pokemon, bot will either give other characters their of bot or replace them.

Scene 2:- You got your first starter pkmn as Zorua. Good luck

Note:- This does has a relationship and reputation system, You won't see but your choices effects, so if you become gentle and show signs of love they might replicate, but if you mock them, good luck, they might become your enemies

Hello, this is my 2nd and a big bot. I hope you will like it, and pls don't do smut with platonic characters like ash, delia or oak.

And I will try to update it on time..
creator: Glen_Nero
